craigslist.title: Radcliffe Townhouses, LLC
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Radcliffe Townhouses, LLC 3005 N. Radcliffe Lane, Chesapeake, VA 23321 1755.00 / Month 3 BEDROOMS | 1.5 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6MTE4ODMyNA==?property=2720948&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/3005-n.-radcliffe-lane-chesapeake-va/80bea6e0-5307-4589-854a-37f7613a3400?source=craigslist Property Description: Townhome Details: • 3 Bedrooms | 1.5 Bathrooms • Rent: $1,755 per month • 12-Month Lease Term • Totally Electric Home • Tenants are responsible for all utilities • Maximum occupancy: 7 residents Pet-Friendly Community: We welcome your furry family members! • Maximum of 2 pets per household (breed restrictions) • $350 non-refundable pet fee per pet • $30 monthly pet rent per pet We are currently accepting approved applications for our waitlist. Application Requirements: • Application fee: $50 per adult • Payment must be made by money order or cashier’s check payable to McLeskey & Associates • Applications must be submitted in person at: McLeskey & Associates 2859 Virginia Beach Blvd., Suite 106 Virginia Beach, VA 23452 Office Hours: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM Applications are processed on a first-come, first-served basis. Approved applicants only will be placed on the waitlist and contacted when the property becomes available for viewing. Lynetta Rainey, PM show contact info x105 Disclaimer: Please be advised that this offer to lease is for negotiation purposes only and that McLeskey & Associates, LLC. and any agents and clients thereof involved are not bound by any of the above terms and conditions set forth until a final lease is prepared, negotiated and executed by both Tenant and Landlord The information contained in this e-mail is confidential and/or proprietary to and/or its affiliates. The information transmitted herewith is intended only for use by the individual or entity to which it is addressed. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, retransmission, dissemination, distribution, copying or other use of, or taking any action in reliance upon this information is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please contact the sender and delete the material from your computer.
